title: Create: Creativity Ages -- Energy Bridge
description:
Adds energy compatibility between Create: Crafts & Additions and Create: New Age.

This mod introduces an Energy Bridge block that allows power and systems from both mods to interact seamlessly, enabling more efficient and flexible automation setups.
body:
# Create: Creativity Ages – C&A ↔ New Age Compat

Connect Create: Crafts & Additions and Create: New Age through a unified compatibility system.

---

## Overview

Create: Creativity Ages (CCA) is a compatibility mod designed to bridge the gap between Create: Crafts & Additions and Create: New Age.

Many Create addons introduce separate systems that do not naturally interact. CCA resolves this by allowing both mods to function together in a consistent and practical way.

At the core of the mod is the Energy Bridge block. It enables power and systems from both mods to connect and operate together, making cross-mod automation possible.

---

## Features

- Energy Bridge block for cross-mod interaction  
- Connect Crafts & Additions power systems with New Age machinery  
- Support for hybrid automation setups  
- Simplifies complex builds by reducing the need for separate systems  

---

## What this enables

With this mod, you can:

- Combine machines from both mods in a single setup  
- Transfer energy between otherwise incompatible systems  
- Build more compact and efficient automation designs  

---

## Requirements

- Create: Crafts & Additions  
- Create: New Age  

> Both required mods must be installed for this mod to function.
